reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, para parar un rato a mitad de camino. Tiene unas mesas abajo de una arboleda, ideales para almorzar afuera.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop for a bit halfway. It has some tables under a grove of trees, ideal for lunch outside.
